reviews.review_description: This game is very well detailed, and is actually kinda scary... Thats pretty good coming from me who cant get spooked. Anyways, the games overall design is great, the shop could use some more detail and items though. The model isnt that well made, but its ok, the hands are off, glitchy too. I decided to not check out the lab yet. I will soon. But this game is great! I hope the devs keep working on this game.
